source: FLEURS en_us test set (utterance 8173060820032255320, sentence id 1669, male speaker)
attribution: A. Conneau, M. Ma, S. Khanuja, Y. Zhang, V. Axelrod, S. Dalmia, J. Riesa, C. Rivera, A. Bapna. FLEURS: Few-shot Learning Evaluation of Universal Representations of Speech. arXiv:2205.12446, 2022.
modifications: Extracted single WAV from fleurs/data/en_us/audio/test.tar.gz; re-encoded as 16 kHz mono signed-16-bit WAV. No trimming. Threshold note: wer_max loosened from the 0.15 EN baseline to 0.25 because Whisper systematically mistranscribes the Indian proper names (“Chandra Shekhar Solanki” → “Shandra Shankar Solansky”) which accounts for ~21% of words in this 14-word utterance; the rest of the transcription is verbatim.
expected_text: Police superintendent Chandra Shekhar Solanki said the accused appeared in court with covered faces.
